title: Craftable Elytra
description: In this mod, its very simple. You can craft an elytra.
body:
My mod features a craftable elytra. It's very simple, you craft an elytra with phantom membranes and a few diamonds!

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e2d7717e1ef7c7356bb1424360af94e3cfc1722.png)

If you have any issues, join the discord server and request help under the "modrinth-support" channel.

[https://discord.gg/XWjntWtts9](https://discord.gg/XWjntWtts9)


[https://bisecthosting.com/JaggerGTV](https://bisecthosting.com/JaggerGTV)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f891ae6088691c5041caebb79057521baf3ebb8_0.webp)
